ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "x_coord" REAL /* X coordinate of the incident location */,
  "y_coord" REAL /* Y coordinate of the incident location */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier from the source system */,
  "ccn" INTEGER /* Crime Control Number (CCN) */,
  "report_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time the incident was reported */,
  "shift" TEXT /* Shift during which the incident occurred (e.g., DAY, NIGHT) */,
  "offense" TEXT /* Type of offense (e.g., THEFT/OTHER, MOTOR VEHICLE THEFT) */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of the offense (e.g., OTHERS) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the incident record was last modified */,
  "block_site_address" TEXT /* Block and site address of the incident */,
  "block_x_coord" INTEGER /* X coordinate of the block location */,
  "block_y_coord" INTEGER /* Y coordinate of the block location */,
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ward where the incident occurred */,
  "anc_id" TEXT /* Reference to the Advisory Neighborhood Commission (ANC) where the incident occurred */,
  "district_id" TEXT /* Reference to the police district where the incident occurred */,
  "psa_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Police Service Area (PSA) where the incident occurred */,
  "neighborhood_cluster_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood cluster where the incident occurred */,
  "business_improvement_district_id" TEXT /* Reference to the business improvement district where the incident occurred */,
  "block_group_id" TEXT /* Reference to the block group where the incident occurred */,
  "census_tract_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the census tract where the incident occurred */,
  "voting_precinct_id" TEXT /* Reference to the voting precinct where the incident occurred */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the incident */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the incident */,
  "incident_status" TEXT /* Current status of the incident (e.g., OPEN, CLOSED) */,
  "suspect_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the suspect involved, if any */,
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the victim involved, if any */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the officer who reported the incident */,
  "incident_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the incident */,
  "geospatial_data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geospatial data associated with the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_offense FOREIGN KEY ("offense") REFERENCES offense_types ("offense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_block_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_group_id") REFERENCES block_groups ("block_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_method FOREIGN KEY ("method") REFERENCES offense_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_census_tract_id FOREIGN KEY ("census_tract_id") REFERENCES census_tracts ("census_tract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_anc_id FOREIGN KEY ("anc_id") REFERENCES ancs ("anc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_ward_id FOREIGN KEY ("ward_id") REFERENCES wards ("ward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_psa_id FOREIGN KEY ("psa_id") REFERENCES psas ("psa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_business_improvement_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_improvement_district_id") REFERENCES business_improvement_districts ("business_improvement_district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_neighborhood_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_cluster_id") REFERENCES neighborhood_clusters ("neighborhood_cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wards" (
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ward */,
  "ward_name" TEXT /* Name of the ward */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ward */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the ward */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the ward in square kilometers */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the ward office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ancs" (
  "anc_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each ANC */,
  "anc_name" TEXT /* Name of the ANC */,
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ward where the ANC is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ANC */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the ANC area */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the ANC in square kilometers */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the ANC office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each police district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the police district */,
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ward where the district is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the district in square kilometers */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the district office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "psas" (
  "psa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PSA */,
  "psa_name" TEXT /* Name of the PSA */,
  "district_id" TEXT /* Reference to the district where the PSA is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the PSA */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the PSA */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the PSA in square kilometers */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the PSA office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("psa_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhood_clusters" (
  "neighborhood_cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood cluster */,
  "neighborhood_cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood cluster */,
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ward where the neighborhood cluster is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the neighborhood cluster */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood cluster */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the neighborhood cluster in square kilometers */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the neighborhood cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_improvement_districts" (
  "business_improvement_district_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each business improvement district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the business improvement district */,
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ward where the district is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the business improvement district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the business improvement district */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the business improvement district in square kilometers */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the business improvement district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_improvement_district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "block_groups" (
  "block_group_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each block group */,
  "block_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the block group */,
  "census_tract_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the census tract where the block group is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the block group */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the block group */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the block group in square kilometers */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the block group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_tracts" (
  "census_tract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each census tract */,
  "tract_name" TEXT /* Name of the census tract */,
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ward where the tract is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the census tract */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the census tract */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the census tract in square kilometers */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the census tract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("census_tract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_precincts" (
  "voting_precinct_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each voting precinct */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the voting precinct */,
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ward where the precinct is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the voting precinct */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the voting precinct */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the voting precinct in square kilometers */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the voting precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voting_precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., officer, analyst, admin) */,
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ward the user is associated with */,
  "anc_id" TEXT /* Reference to the ANC the user is associated with */,
  "district_id" TEXT /* Reference to the district the user is associated with */,
  "psa_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the PSA the user is associated with */,
  "neighborhood_cluster_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood cluster the user is associated with */,
  "business_improvement_district_id" TEXT /* Reference to the business improvement district the user is associated with */,
  "block_group_id" TEXT /* Reference to the block group the user is associated with */,
  "census_tract_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the census tract the user is associated with */,
  "voting_precinct_id" TEXT /* Reference to the voting precinct the user is associated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_voting_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("voting_precinct_id") REFERENCES voting_precincts ("voting_precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_anc_id FOREIGN KEY ("anc_id") REFERENCES ancs ("anc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_business_improvement_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_improvement_district_id") REFERENCES business_improvement_districts ("business_improvement_district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_census_tract_id FOREIGN KEY ("census_tract_id") REFERENCES census_tracts ("census_tract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_ward_id FOREIGN KEY ("ward_id") REFERENCES wards ("ward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_neighborhood_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_cluster_id") REFERENCES neighborhood_clusters ("neighborhood_cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_psa_id FOREIGN KEY ("psa_id") REFERENCES psas ("psa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_block_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_group_id") REFERENCES block_groups ("block_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the incident */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the incident was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offense_types" (
  "offense_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each type of offense */,
  "offense_name" TEXT /* Name of the offense type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the offense type */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the offense type (e.g., LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offense_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offense_methods" (
  "method_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each method used in offenses */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the method (e.g., LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)
